sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ImmunityBio, Inc. (IBRX) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announced that investors who suffered losses related to ImmunityBio, Inc. (IBRX) have the opportunity to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that between January 19, 2026, and March 24, 2026, ImmunityBio chairman and CEO Patrick Soon-Shiong materially overstated the capabilities of Anktiva. Shareholders who lost money are encouraged to contact the law firm before the May 26, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline.

feed.title: InterDigital Signs Patent Licensing Agreements With Buffalo, TV Maker
feed.summary: InterDigital Inc. (Nasdaq: IDCC) has announced new patent licensing agreements with Buffalo Americas Inc. and a global television manufacturer. The agreement with Buffalo Americas covers Wi-Fi 5 and Wi-Fi 6 technologies, while the TV manufacturer agreements relate to high-efficiency video coding and a joint licensing program with Sony. These deals highlight InterDigital's broad innovation in wireless, video, and AI technologies.

feed.title: Infleqtion (NYSE: INFQ) guides 2026 revenue to $40M as losses narrow
feed.summary: Infleqtion (NYSE: INFQ) has set its 2026 revenue guidance at $40 million, driven by increasing demand for its quantum sensing and computing solutions. The company also reported narrowing losses in 2025, with GAAP loss from operations improving to $35.3 million from $53.0 million in 2024, and non-GAAP operating and net losses also seeing significant reductions. Infleqtion will host a conference call on April 8, 2026, to discuss these results and its future outlook.

feed.title: T Stamp (IDAI) controller gains shares as RSUs vest and taxes withheld
feed.summary: T Stamp Inc.'s Financial Controller, Ming Tracy, reported an RSU vesting event where 3,286 Restricted Stock Units converted into Class A Common Stock. The company subsequently withheld 1,018 shares to cover tax obligations at $2.60 per share. After these transactions, Tracy directly holds 3,557 shares of Class A Common Stock.

feed.title: [ARS] Installed Building Products, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an SEC filing of type ARS for Installed Building Products, Inc. (IBP) on April 8, 2026, which is available as a PDF document. The filing is categorized with a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides a company overview, including market cap, industry, and recent news and SEC filings for IBP.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Lowers Installed Building Products Price Target
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has reduced its price target for Installed Building Products (NYSE:IBP) from $340.00 to $285.00, maintaining an 'equal weight' rating, due to current market conditions in the construction and housing sectors. This adjustment signals broader economic trends and shifts in investor sentiment. The company, a major player in residential construction, is being closely watched by investors for future performance amidst market volatility.

feed.title: i-80 Gold posts high-grade drill results at Archimedes Underground Project, Nevada
feed.summary: i-80 Gold Corp. reported high-grade assay results from its recent drilling campaign at the Archimedes Underground Project in Nevada. The results confirm mineralization in the Upper Archimedes zone and suggest potential to extend it, with development advancing on schedule for first gold in Q3 2026. The company is also evaluating the integration of oxide material and anticipates a new mineral resource estimate and feasibility study for the project in Q1 2027.

feed.title: HSAI Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: This article analyzes Hesai Group's (HSAI) financial performance, focusing on its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and comparison with competitors. HSAI primarily generates revenue from its LiDAR segment (98.3%), with a gross margin of 41.03%. The company's financial health is benchmarked against industry leaders like MGA and ITT, highlighting its competitive advantage in gross margin.

feed.title: HSBC Refines Australia Exit Strategy With Focus on Loan Portfolio Sale
feed.summary: HSBC is refining its exit strategy from Australia by prioritizing the sale of its loan portfolio rather than divesting the entire retail banking unit. This move aligns with HSBC's global restructuring goals to focus on core markets and high-growth regions like Asia, similar to its previous exit from New Zealand. The bank is also undergoing a significant operational overhaul including cost-saving programs and AI adoption, while other financial firms like Deutsche Bank and Citigroup are also divesting non-core assets.

feed.title: ATI, AAR, and HEICO Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of aerospace companies ATI, AAR, and HEICO saw significant jumps after a two-week ceasefire was agreed upon between the U.S. and Iran, which positively impacted the aerospace sector due to improved commercial aviation prospects and stabilization of global trade routes. The ceasefire followed a period of conflict that had caused equity prices to fall, and the market viewed this news as a meaningful, though not fundamentally business-altering, development for these companies. AAR, in particular, has demonstrated strong year-to-date performance, hitting a new 52-week high.

feed.title: ICL Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: The article analyzes ICL Group Ltd.'s financial performance, focusing on its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and competitor comparison within the Agricultural Chemicals industry. It highlights that Phosphate Solutions is ICL's largest revenue contributor, and the company maintains a gross margin of 27.51% despite negative operating and net margins. ICL's financial metrics are benchmarked against industry peers like MOS and SMG to provide context for its market valuation.

feed.title: Is Booking Holdings (BKNG) Starting To Look Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) shares are showing signs of potential undervaluation after recent price weakness, despite positive short-term returns. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 40.1%, while its P/E ratio of 26.5x is below Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 36.4x. This analysis indicates Booking Holdings could be an attractive investment opportunity given its current trading price.

feed.title: Assessing Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Valuation After Precision Oncology Integration With Flatiron Health
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) is under review after integrating its Precision Oncology test portfolio with Flatiron Health's OncoEMR platform. Despite recent share price declines, the company is considered modestly undervalued at $103.56 against a fair value of $113.88, driven by its long-term growth and cash generation. However, its P/E ratio is above the industry average, prompting investors to consider if it's a quality name at a reasonable price or if they are paying a premium.

feed.title: Assessing Royalty Pharma (RPRX) Valuation After Johnson & Johnson Autoimmune Co Funding Deal
feed.summary: Royalty Pharma's valuation is under review following a US$500 million R&D co-funding agreement with Johnson & Johnson for an autoimmune therapy. While the company's Q1 returns are strong, analysts disagree on whether to value the company based on a discounted cash flow narrative that suggests it is undervalued or an earnings multiple that implies the market is already paying a premium. This article discusses both perspectives and encourages investors to weigh key rewards and warning signs.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Urges Hercules Capital
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Hercules Capital, Inc. (NYSE:HTGC) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between May 1, 2025, and February 27, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Hercules Capital made false or misleading statements regarding its due diligence, portfolio valuation, and misclassified investments, leading to overstated valuations and investor losses. Investors suffering losses are encouraged to contact the firm before May 19, 2026, to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire Urges Hercules Capital Investors to Contact Firm Before May 19th
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Hercules Capital, Inc. (NYSE:HTGC), alleging the company overstated its due diligence and misclassified investments, leading to misrepresented portfolio valuations. Investors who purchased Hercules Capital securities between May 1, 2025, and February 27, 2026, and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the law firm before May 19, 2026, to apply for lead plaintiff status. The lawsuit highlights issues of transparency and accurate reporting in the alternative investment industry.

feed.title: Hess Midstream LP stock: What you should know now as a stable energy play
feed.summary: Hess Midstream LP (HESM) offers stability in the volatile energy sector through its fee-based model, focusing on gathering, processing, and transporting natural gas and crude for Hess Corporation's Bakken and Guyana operations. The company benefits from long-term, take-or-pay contracts, ensuring predictable revenue and minimizing exposure to commodity price swings. This makes HESM an attractive option for investors seeking yield and income stability, supported by strong distribution coverage and strategic growth alignment with its parent company.

feed.title: Gorilla Technology (GRRR) CTO details RSU and share holdings
feed.summary: Gorilla Technology Group Inc.'s Chief Technology Officer, Natarajan Rajesh Raj, has reported his initial equity holdings. He directly holds 78,658 Restricted Stock Units and 679,853 ordinary shares as of March 18, 2026. The RSUs, granted under the company's 2023 Omnibus Incentive Plan, are set to vest on July 13, 2026, contingent on his continuous service and meeting award terms.

feed.title: GIII Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: This article provides a financial analysis of G-III Apparel Group Ltd (GIII), detailing its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and a comparison with competitors WWW and VSTS. GIII's largest revenue contributor is Wholesale Proprietary brands, accounting for 48.7% of total sales. The company maintains a gross margin of 35.98% but has a negative net margin of -4.14%, and a Return on Equity (ROE) of 3.92%.

feed.title: Inventory turnover of Greenlane Holdings, Inc. Class A – GETTEX:G671
feed.summary: This article provides limited financial information for Greenlane Holdings, Inc. Class A (GETTEX:G671), specifically focusing on its inventory turnover. The content indicates that the market is closed and offers a period value, change, and change percentage for the inventory turnover metric.

feed.title: 144] Global-E Online Ltd. SEC Filing
feed.summary: Amir-Yehuda Schlachet plans to sell 108,329 ordinary shares of Global-E Online Ltd., valued at $3,331,116.75, according to a recent Form 144 SEC filing. The filing, made on April 8, 2026, also details several previous transactions by Schlachet over the last three months, including sales of thousands of shares on various dates. This notice provides transparency regarding significant share sales that could impact the stock price of Global-E Online Ltd.

feed.title: Alphabet Class C Shares Surge 3.3% to $313.96 on AI Momentum and Broadcom Partnership
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc.'s Class C shares rose over 3% to $313.96, driven by investor optimism about the company's artificial intelligence initiatives and cloud computing business. Key factors include an expanding partnership with Broadcom for custom AI chips and Google Cloud's substantial growth and backlog. Despite high capital expenditures and regulatory challenges, analysts remain bullish, expecting strong Q1 2026 earnings driven by AI monetization and cloud growth.

feed.title: Disney plans extensive round of layoffs in the coming weeks
feed.summary: Walt Disney Co. is preparing for an extensive round of layoffs in the coming weeks, potentially impacting up to 1,000 employees. These cuts are primarily expected from the consolidation of Disney's marketing department and reflect broader challenges in Hollywood, such as declining theatrical revenues and shrinking linear TV audiences, as well as the smaller profits from streaming services. The move follows similar workforce reductions across the industry, including recent cuts by Sony Pictures Entertainment and previous layoffs by Disney after Bob Iger's return.

feed.title: Operating cash flow per share of Franklin Street Properties Corp. – BX:WVH
feed.summary: This article displays financial information for Franklin Street Properties Corp. (BX:WVH) on the TradingView platform, specifically focusing on its operating cash flow per share. It appears to be a stub or a section of a larger financial data page, showing the stock's market status and navigating current and historical financial metrics. The content implies that detailed operating cash flow data would be presented within the TradingView interface.

feed.title: Canary files S-1 for PEPE ETF as memecoin funds expand beyond DOGE
feed.summary: Canary Capital has filed an S-1 registration statement for a spot PEPE ETF, aiming to provide direct exposure to the memecoin through traditional brokerage accounts. This development follows Dogecoin's successful entry into the public market with Grayscale's GDOG ETF and other memecoin ETF proposals for BONK and even TRUMP-related tokens. The filing highlights the speculative nature of PEPE and the unregulated status of spot memecoin markets, while also noting the increasing expansion of memecoin funds beyond just DOGE.

feed.title: FRP Holdings Delays 2025 Earnings Report, Schedules Conference Call
feed.summary: FRP Holdings, Inc. has announced a delay in filing its 2025 annual report due to an extended year-end audit process, though it stresses there are no disagreements with its auditors. The company plans to release Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings on April 10, 2026, and file the 10-K report by April 15, 2026, with investors closely monitoring the situation for transparency.

feed.title: After audit delay, FRP Holdings sets April 10 earnings release
feed.summary: FRP Holdings (NASDAQ: FRPH) announced it would release its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings results on April 10, 2026, and host a conference call on the same day. This follows a Form 12b-25 filing on March 31, 2026, notifying the SEC of a late 10-K due to additional time needed for the year-end audit, which was not due to auditor disagreements. The company expects to file its Form 10-K on or before April 15, 2026.

feed.title: Strong growth and pay plans at First Watch (NASDAQ: FWRG) 2026 meeting
feed.summary: First Watch Restaurant Group, Inc. (FWRG) has announced its 2026 Annual Meeting, where shareholders will vote on director elections, executive compensation, and auditor ratification. The company reported robust financial performance for fiscal 2025, with significant increases in total revenues, same-restaurant sales, net income, and Adjusted EBITDA. Executive compensation plans for 2025 included merit-based salary raises, performance-based annual cash incentives tied to Adjusted EBITDA and net unit growth, and long-term equity awards, alongside special one-time RSU retention grants for the CEO and other key executives to ensure leadership continuity.

feed.title: HOMB Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: This article analyzes the financials of Home BancShares Inc (HOMB), focusing on its profitability margins and comparing it to competitors like ABCB and OZK. HOMB boasts an operating margin of 59.47%, a net margin of 46.10%, and a Return on Equity (ROE) of 11.51%, indicating strong efficiency in converting operations into shareholder value. With a market capitalization of $5.69 billion, HOMB holds a leading position in its sector.

feed.title: Forward Industries (FORD) major holder sells 6.16M shares back to company
feed.summary: Forward Industries (FORD) repurchased 6,164,324 shares of its common stock from Multicoin Capital Master Fund at $4.44 per share on March 18, 2026. Following this transaction, Multicoin Capital entities and Tushar Jain beneficially own 6,242,315 shares, including warrants, which represents about 7.0% of Forward Industries' outstanding common stock. This filing, an amended Schedule 13D, also removed Pyahm Samani as a reporting person due to his resignation.

feed.title: BTIG Maintains Buy on Harrow Health, Inc. (HROW) March 2026
feed.summary: BTIG reiterated its Buy rating on Harrow Health, Inc. (HROW) on March 18, 2026, ahead of company presentations, indicating continued constructive sentiment. The firm did not issue a new price target. Following the announcement, HROW's stock experienced a 3.87% price movement, with Meyka AI assigning a grade of B to the company based on various financial metrics.

feed.title: FRPT Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: The article provides a financial overview of Freshpet Inc (FRPT), detailing its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and a comparison with competitors. Freshpet generates 80.5% of its revenue from Grocery Mass and Club, and boasts strong margins including a 43.54% gross margin. The company's financial health, encompassing metrics like operating margin, net margin, and ROE, is also discussed in relation to its market capitalization of $3.09 billion and competitors like TR and COCO.

feed.title: GAM (NYSE: GAM) CEO boosts 5.95% preferred stake with new buy
feed.summary: Jeffrey W. Priest, President & CEO of General American Investors Co Inc. (NYSE: GAM), purchased 5,000 shares of the company's 5.95% Preferred Stock for $24.685 per share in an open-market transaction. This acquisition increased his direct holdings of the 5.95% Preferred Stock to 40,691 shares. Priest also holds substantial direct and indirect common and preferred shares, though he disclaims beneficial interest in shares held indirectly through certain arrangements.

feed.title: Fortis vs. the Rest: How Does It Compare to Other Canadian Utility Stocks?
feed.summary: This article analyzes how Fortis (FTS) compares to other Canadian utility stocks, highlighting its reputation for stability, predictable cash flows, and dependable dividends, stemming from its regulated assets and five-decade dividend growth. It contrasts Fortis with traditional utilities like Canadian Utilities (CU) and Hydro One (H), and growth-oriented alternatives such as Brookfield Infrastructure Corporation (BIPC), Brookfield Renewable Corporation (BEPC), and Capital Power (CPX), noting that while Fortis is a benchmark for conservative investing, it offers slower capital appreciation compared to growth-focused peers. The article concludes that Fortis is a strong core holding for a diversified portfolio due to its reliability, but investors seeking higher growth or yield might consider other options.

feed.title: Hut 8 (HUT) Soars 16.65% as Economy Fears Subside
feed.summary: Hut 8 (HUT) saw its share prices rise by 16.65% for the sixth consecutive day, closing at $61.43, as investor fears about the global economy eased following a US-Iran ceasefire and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. The rally was also fueled by optimism for companies tied to US priority industries like AI, with Hut 8 developing a $10 billion data center and having a significant leasing deal with Google that could generate billions in revenue. Arete Research issued a "buy" recommendation with a $136 price target for Hut 8.

feed.title: NXP Semiconductors NV (NXPI) Shares Up 4.78% on Apr 8
feed.summary: Shares of NXP Semiconductors NV (NXPI) rose 4.78% on April 8, reaching an intraday high of $208.67 before closing at $204.44. Wall Street analysts have an average one-year price target of $261.44 for NXPI, implying a 27.88% upside. GuruFocus estimates the fair value (GF Value) at $241.23, suggesting an 18% upside from the current price.

feed.title: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust to Report Q1 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust, a significant commercial real estate investment firm, announced it would report its first-quarter 2026 financial results soon. This report is anticipated to provide key insights into the health and performance of the commercial real estate market, with investors closely monitoring trends like occupancy rates and rental income. The company invests in various commercial real estate assets, including office buildings and multifamily properties, across the United States.

feed.title: FedEx reaches tentative wage deal with pilots after years of talks
feed.summary: FedEx and the Air Line Pilots Association (ALPA), representing over 5,000 pilots, have reached a tentative wage deal after years of negotiations. The agreement includes a significant hourly wage increase of about 40% in 2026, followed by annual 3% increases from 2028-2030, and retroactive pay for captains and first officers. This deal follows the narrow rejection of a previous agreement in 2023.

feed.title: GameSquare Achieves First Positive Adjusted EBITDA Quarter in Fourth Quarter, Marking Inflection to Operating Profitability
feed.summary: GameSquare Holdings, Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2025, reporting a significant achievement of positive adjusted EBITDA of $1.7 million, or 9.4% of revenue, on $18.5 million in revenue. This marks a crucial inflection point for the company, demonstrating the scalability and earnings power of its operating model, further enhanced by strategic acquisitions like TubeBuddy. The company anticipates strong revenue growth and profitable annual adjusted EBITDA in 2026, building on its momentum in the creator economy.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Rally?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) after its significant multi-year rally, assessing whether its current share price of US$296.62 is still fair. Using two valuation approaches, the Excess Returns model suggests the stock is about 6.5% overvalued, while the Price vs. Earnings model indicates it is overvalued compared to a proprietary "Fair Ratio." The article provides insights into CBOE's valuation and encourages investors to use Simply Wall St's "Narratives" feature for personalized analysis.

feed.title: Arista Networks Stock Up 6% on Analyst Buy Rating and $180 Target - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Arista Networks' stock surged nearly 6% following an analyst upgrade from Rosenblatt, driven by optimism surrounding the company's AI infrastructure strategy. Analyst Mike Genovese raised his rating to "buy" with a $180 price target, highlighting Arista's extra-dense pluggable optics approach for AI facilities as a key competitive advantage. This strategy is expected to help retain major clients like Microsoft and Meta Platforms, potentially leading to substantial revenue growth beyond the company's own guidance.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Steel Dynamics (STLD) Board Retirements And Strong Q1 Earnings Expectations
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (STLD) is undergoing leadership changes with two long-time directors retiring from its Board in May 2026, ahead of anticipated strong first-quarter earnings for 2026. Analysts expect significant year-over-year profit growth due to robust steel prices and healthy demand. The company is balancing shareholder returns, including a recent dividend increase, with substantial investments in new aluminum and biocarbon operations, which are projected to drive future revenue and earnings growth.

feed.title: Buy, Sell Or Hold: HDFC Bank, ONGC, IndusInd Bank, Lodha Developers, Ashok Leyland And Tata Power — Ask Profit
feed.summary: Analysts CA Tapan Doshi and Rahul Sharma offered buy, sell, and hold recommendations for several Indian stocks, including HDFC Bank, IndusInd Bank, Lodha Developers, ONGC, Tata Power, and Ashok Leyland, on NDTV Profit's 'Ask Profit' show. Their advice covers short-term and long-term perspectives, target prices, and entry/exit strategies based on current market conditions. The recommendations aim to guide investors on navigating their positions in these companies.

feed.title: Finwise Bancorp (FINW) officer discloses common stock and option holdings
feed.summary: Finwise Bancorp officer Timothy Stephen Brosnan has reported his initial ownership holdings, detailed in a Form 3 SEC filing. His direct holdings include 18,692 shares of common stock, alongside employee stock options for an additional 12,363 shares with various exercise prices and expiration dates through 2031, 2032, and 2033. Some options are partially vested, while others are fully vested and exercisable by specific dates.

feed.title: Fidelity MSCI Consumer Discretionary Index ETF (FDIS) stock price, news, quote and history
feed.summary: This article provides detailed financial information for the Fidelity MSCI Consumer Discretionary Index ETF (FDIS), including its current stock price, historical data, performance metrics, and holdings. The ETF invests in U.S. consumer discretionary sector securities, aiming to track the MSCI USA IMI Consumer Discretionary 25/50 Index. It also lists related tickers and various market indices.

feed.title: EZGO Technologies Sets Up $100 Million At-The-Market Equity Offering Program
feed.summary: EZGO Technologies (EZGO) has established an at-the-market equity offering program, allowing the company to sell up to $100 million in ordinary shares. This program provides EZGO with flexibility to raise capital for general corporate purposes, including expanding sales channels, purchasing new production lines, and investing in R&D, without being obligated to sell any shares immediately. Despite this capital-raising framework, its stock currently holds a "Sell" rating from analysts with a $1.00 price target and Spark's AI Analyst rates it as "Neutral" due to weak financial performance and technical indicators.

feed.title: Apple seeks internal data from Samsung in South Korea in ongoing antitrust case
feed.summary: Apple is seeking internal Samsung data from South Korea as part of its ongoing antitrust battle with the U.S. government. Having faced refusal from Samsung's U.S. subsidiary, Apple has filed a request via the Hague Convention to obtain documents from Samsung Electronics in South Korea. These documents pertain to Samsung's smartphone, smartwatch, and app store businesses and are aimed at demonstrating the competitiveness of the market and refuting claims of anticompetitive practices.

feed.summary: This article provides financial information for FibroBiologics, Inc. (LSX:A426UV) focusing on its price-to-sales ratio. The page also lists various services and links offered by TradingView.

feed.title: Franklin Covey Co Q2 FY2026: Revenue $59.65M, EPS $(0.17) — 10-Q Summary
feed.summary: Franklin Covey Co reported essentially flat revenue in Q2 FY2026 at $59.65 million, but swung deeper into a net loss of $(1.982) million, resulting in a diluted EPS of $(0.17). Despite growth in its Education segment, driven by Leader in Me adoption, the company faced softness in Enterprise North America and underwent a restructuring to reduce costs and improve sales execution.
